name: White Noise
description: Gentle rain / white noise mode — softly cascading tiles that create a soothing ambient pitter-patter
author: FiestaBoard Team

intensity.title: Rain Intensity
intensity.description: How many drops appear per frame. 'light' is a gentle drizzle, 'heavy' is a steady rain. Use 'custom' for manual control.

drops_per_frame.title: Drops Per Frame
drops_per_frame.description: Number of new drops to spawn each frame (only used when intensity is 'custom'). Range: 1-22.

max_drops.title: Max Simultaneous Drops
max_drops.description: Maximum number of raindrops allowed on the board at once. Higher = denser rain. Range: 1-132.

env_vars.name: WHITE_NOISE_ENABLED
env_vars.description: Enable the white noise rain effect

env_vars.name: WHITE_NOISE_INTENSITY
env_vars.description: Rain intensity: light, medium, heavy, or custom

env_vars.name: WHITE_NOISE_DROP_COLOR
env_vars.description: Raindrop tile color: white, blue, or violet

env_vars.name: WHITE_NOISE_DROPS_PER_FRAME
env_vars.description: Number of drops per frame when using custom intensity (1-22)

white_noise.description: Full white noise rain pattern for board display

active_drops.description: Number of active raindrops on screen

screenshots.alt: White Noise displayed on a Vestaboard
screenshots.caption: Gentle rain / white noise mode — softly cascading tiles that create a soothing ambient pitter-patter
